texto: As pervasive as medicine has become in modern life, it remains mostly hidden and often misunderstood. We have taken it to be both more perfect than it is and less extraordinary than it can be.
explicacao: Citação de Gawande Atul sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “As pervasive as medicine has become in modern life, it remains mostly hidden and often misunderst…” articula reflexao, medicine, pervasive em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
